title: styrax formosanus var. hayataianus
intro: Styrax formosanus var. hayataianus, also known as Taiwan styrax or Formosa styrax, is a variety of the Styrax tree native to Taiwan. This plant is valued for its resin, which has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The resin has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, sore throats, and respiratory problems, and has also been shown to have antioxidant and wound-healing properties. In traditional herbal preparations, the resin is often used to make teas, tinctures, and ointments, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal benefits.
